steps.title: Use the legitimacy context
steps.content: The sentence discusses factors that allowed a monarch to establish legitimacy. The blank must describe claiming or stating the right to hold the throne.

steps.title: Pick the claiming verb
steps.content: B means add notes to a text, C means return a gesture, and D means withdraw. The matching word means state a right confidently, which fits a monarch's claim to the throne. The answer is A.
